SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-31-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY, D.D.S., INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY, D.D.S. AND SUSAN MATHER, EMPLOYEE. DEFENDANT MAT KIISK, D.D.S., INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF PRESENTED PROOF OF SERVICE BY PERSONAL SERVICE TO THE COURTROOM CLERK AND WAS TOLD THAT PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED TO FILE 5 DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING AND INSTRUCTED TO FILE IT AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE IN RM 103. THE FILING OFFICE CLERK INFORMS COURTROOM CLERK THAT THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS IMPROPER AS CLAIM WAS SERVED TO DEFENDANT AS AN INDIVIDUAL INSTEAD OF A BUSINESS. CASE IS CONTINUED FOR PROPER PROOF OF SERVICE AND FOR PLAINTIFF TO RE-SERVE CLAIM TO THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIKHAIL BERDICHEVSKY, D.D.S., INC.
